overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western video game showing a character walking down a muddy, gas-lit street in a historic industrial district at night. The scene transitions from a wooden commercial building past a horse-drawn carriage to a restricted industrial zone with warning signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy gas-lit street with wooden commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy street past a two-story wooden building with illuminated balconies

entered.detail: historic wooden building with wrap-around balcony and warm gas lamp lighting
tall wooden plank fence running along the right side of the street
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light onto the wet cobblestones

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow muddy street at night, passing a two-story wooden building with balconies on the left illuminated by gas lamps. A tall wooden fence lines the right side, and the wet cobblestones reflect the warm artificial lighting.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from the left and passes by heading in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the street and passing the character

entered.detail: wooden carriage with canvas cover pulled by horses moving along the road
red brick warehouse building with large windows and industrial architecture
green wooden door with white painted NO ENTRY text

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the wooden commercial building gives way to industrial brick warehouses on the right. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left, and a green door with 'NO ENTRY' painted on it becomes visible on the right side of the street.

events.description: approaching the wooden gate with 'KEEP OUT UNLESS AUTHORIZED' warning sign marking a restricted area

agents.ego_description: walking past the restricted industrial gate and continuing down the muddy street toward the factory buildings

entered.detail: large wooden gate with horizontal planks marking the entrance to a restricted industrial area
white sign with black text reading 'KEEP OUT UNLESS AUTHORIZED' attached to the fence

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a restricted industrial zone marked by a wooden gate with a 'KEEP OUT UNLESS AUTHORIZED' sign. The street narrows as it leads toward factory buildings with visible smokestacks in the background, while the wooden fence continues along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a muddy, gas-lit street that transforms from a commercial district into a restricted industrial zone. It begins by following a character past a two-story wooden building with balconies, where warm gas lamps reflect off the wet cobblestones and a tall wooden fence lines the right. As the character progresses, the wooden architecture gives way to industrial brick warehouses and a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left. The scene then shifts toward a green door marked with a no entry warning before the street narrows further. Finally, the camera approaches a wooden gate with a keep out sign, leading toward distant factory buildings and towering smokestacks.
